title: Rohans Aluminium Credit Card Holder Wallet CASE Purse Metal Business Card Protector UK
features: Perfect Gift- This card holder case with its minimalist design is great gift idea for Men, Women, for your lover, friends, relatives. Choose your favorite color and give it as a gift for Birthday, Back to School, Valentine's Day, Easter Day, Mother's Day, Labor Day, Halloween, Thanksgiving Day and Christmas
Compactness: This cute card holder wallet measures 110 x 75mm, weighs only 2.48 oz., extremely convenient and lightweight case can be carried around in your pocket or slip into your purse

Aluminum Material: Made of high-quality aluminum which provides sturdiness, crush-resistance and at the same time it is water-proof, weather proof. and durable. Rounded corner wouldn't damage on your clothes

Super Protection: Protected from Radio Frequency Identification (RFID) - Disables the scammers from reading your personal information & card details via radio frequency from being stolen, your bank debit, ID, ATM
Large Capacity- 6 Slots: Rohans aluminum card holder wallet is designed with 6 accordion slots to organize your credit cards, ID cards, metro cards, business cards, driver's licenses and more
description: For Both Men And Women, This Is A Stylish Accessory For Both. This Lightweight Aluminum Credit Card Holder Fits Easily In Your Pocket Or Purse And Can Be Easily Removed In The Glove Compartment, Desk Or Bag. The Durable Strong Material Makes The Case Wallet Water Repellent And Crush Resistant. Can Be Used For Storing Credit Cards, Business Cards, Gift Cards, Small Photos, Money Etc. Great For Organizing Yourself, Protecting And Storing. Protected Radio Frequency Identification Rfid Turns The Gold Color Off Your Card Via Radio Frequency. A Wonderful Gift. Specification Secure Pop Click Open, And Simply Close Secure By Clicking On Both Ends And Close. For Cards The Standard Has 6 Slots But Can Also Hold A Card With Both Sides And The Pockets Are Expandable For Things Like Cash. Size 110M X 75Mm Weight 80 Grams 2.48 Oz Package Includes 1 X Aluminum Credit Card Case Holder
